opportunity: The monitor revision shows Lydia was still editing at 20:13, meaning she was seated at the desk when the murder occurred; the lamp sits on the same desk, so her hands could easily reach the cord to strangle the victim.

clue_1.title: Blue‑taped Mug
clue_1.detail: Mug – the cracked handle is freshly wrapped in blue tape exactly as Martin described, corroborating the specific task he said he completed before leaving.

clue_2.title: Monitor Revision History
clue_2.detail: Monitor – the visible revision history shows a keyboard edit at 20:13, proving the speaker was at the desk after 20:00; death occurred between 20:11 and 20:13.

clue_3.title: Lamp Cord Evidence
clue_3.detail: Lamp and Monitor – the lamp’s cord is frayed and positioned as if used to strangle, matching the method; the monitor evidence shows Lydia was still at the desk, putting her within arm’s reach of the lamp.

clue_4.title: Desk Paper Piles
clue_4.detail: Desk – the desk contains two neat paper piles with the red folder face‑down, matching Jasper's unusually specific description of how he left it.

clue_5.title: Suspicious Lamp Shade
clue_5.detail: Lamp – the shade is slightly askew, suggesting it may have been moved recently.
